method: Official marketaccessetf.com product-page HTML parsing of Fund Information, Fund Data, exchange listings, Index facts, Latest Factsheets, and Legal Documents for an explicit Market Access target ISIN list.

listing_rows.etf_name: Market Access Rogers International Commodity Index UCITS ETF
listing_rows.objective: Access one of the broadest and most diversified commodity benchmark indices The Rogers International Commodity Index UCITS ETF tracks the performance of the Jim Rogers International Commodity Index®, a US dollar-denominated total return index that represents the value of a basket of commodities consumed in the global economy, ranging from agricultural to energy to metal products. The index provides exposure to 38 different exchange-traded commodities.
listing_rows.factsheet_url: https://marketaccessetf.com/Products/DownloadETFs?Filename=Market Access Rogers International Commodity Index UCITS ETF.PDF

listing_rows.etf_name: Market Access NYSE Arca Gold BUGS Index UCITS ETF
listing_rows.objective: Access global gold mining stocks The NYSE Arca Gold BUGS Index UCITS ETF tracks the performance of the NYSE Arca Gold BUGS Index (Basket of Un-hedged Gold Stocks), a modified equally weighted index of companies involved in gold mining. The index is designed to provide significant exposure to near-term movements in gold prices by including companies that do not hedge their gold production beyond 1.5 years.
listing_rows.factsheet_url: https://marketaccessetf.com/Products/DownloadETFs?Filename=Market Access NYSE Arca Gold BUGS Index UCITS ETF.PDF

listing_rows.etf_name: Market Access Stoxx China A Minimum Variance Index UCITS ETF - EUR Share Class
listing_rows.index_name: Stoxx® China A 900 Minimum Variance Unconstrained AM Index
listing_rows.objective: Access the Chinese market with reduced volatility The Market Access Stoxx® China A Minimum Variance Index UCITS ETF tracks the performance of the Stoxx® China A 900 Minimum Variance Unconstrained AM Index, an onshore-Renminbi denominated index which selects its constituents from the STOXX China A 900 Index, with the aim of reducing volatility.
listing_rows.factsheet_url: https://marketaccessetf.com/Products/DownloadETFs?Filename=Market Access STOXX China A Minimum Variance Index UCITS ETF - EUR Share Class.PDF
